creator: sylvain@sylvaingarrigues.com
text:
Here is the error:

/usr/src/sys/kern/subr_intr.c:1041:49: error: use of undeclared identifier 'irq'
                debugf("irq %u add handler error %d on %s\n", irq, error, name);
                                                              ^
1 error generated.
